headings.usage: Use for all page titles, section headers, and card titles. Tight tracking (-0.02em) for sizes above 24px.

body.usage: General UI text, descriptions, and long-form content. High legibility.

data.usage: Price tickers, P&L numbers, confidence scores, and tabular data.

glassmorphism.panel: backdrop-filter: blur(12px); background: rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.7); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(99,102,241,0.4)] rounded-md font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase text-xs transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 hover:border-white/40 rounded-md font-medium text-xs transition-all

inputs.style: bg-black/50 border-white/10 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-md text-sm font-data

charts.style: Minimal axes, gradient fills for areas, thin stroke lines (1.5px). Tooltips must be dark glassmorphism.

layout_strategy.spacing: Use comfortable spacing (gap-6, p-6) for breathing room, but compact density for data tables.

motion_guidelines.micro_interactions: Buttons scale down slightly on click (active:scale-95). Cards lift slightly on hover (-translate-y-1).
motion_guidelines.loading: Use skeleton loaders with a shimmer effect (bg-white/5 to bg-white/10).

instructions_to_main_agent: FORCE DARK MODE: Ensure the html tag has class='dark' by default.
Do not use gradients for text colors. Keep text solid white or grey for readability against dark backgrounds.
Implement a 'Ticker Tape' marquee at the top of the dashboard for live crypto prices.
For the 'Beast AI' chat, use a distinct purple/indigo accent to differentiate it from the trading tools.
Ensure all data tables have sticky headers and row hover effects (bg-white/5).
On the landing page, use the 'landing_hero_bg' with a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/80) so text pops.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx.
